title: Character Document
description: Transport envelope bundling a character's sheets across the 5-schema split for the orchestrator's derive/validate endpoints. CORE is the only required sheet — it is the authoritative source the others derive from; the remaining sheets are optional and, when present, each validates against its own contract via $ref. Structural only: rule-math validation is delegated to the per-sheet validators. Pre-1.0, may break until F07 closes.

schema_version.description: Envelope contract version. Optional in light v1; becomes required at 1.0.

core.description: The authoritative CORE sheet. The minimal accepted core carries species, background, class, subclass and level; everything derivable is derived from it, the rest is flagged.
